summary: Completed comprehensive testing of guest mode restrictions, bottom nav removal, and teacher rename. All 13 features verified. Backend: 7/7 tests pass. Frontend: All UI tests pass.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Guest demo mode: 'Try Demo' button creates guest session and redirects to /dashboard
Guest dashboard: Shows courses grid and 'This Week' hero card with guest banner at top
Guest desktop nav: Shows only Home, Courses, Chat (no Messages, Progress, Search, Admin)
Guest mobile dropdown: Shows only 'Sign Out' - Progress and Messages correctly hidden
Guest Chat page: Shows 5 demo messages between 'Teacher' and 'Sarah M.' with read-only CTA (no input field)
Guest Settings page: Shows ONLY ThemeToggle (Appearance card) and 'Sign up to access full settings' CTA
Guest Messages page: Shows blocked state with 'Sign up to send private messages' CTA
Backend: POST /api/chat with guest token returns 403 'Guest accounts cannot perform this action'
Backend: POST /api/messages with guest token returns 403 'Guest accounts cannot perform this action'
Backend: GET /api/chat with guest token returns 5 demo messages successfully
Backend: WebSocket /api/ws/chat rejects guest with 403 'Guests cannot use live chat'
Admin login: kirah092804@gmail.com works and shows full navigation (all 8 links visible)
Teacher name: All courses and chat messages show 'Teacher' not 'Shakira'
No bottom navigation bar visible on any page (Dashboard, Chat, Settings)
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx correctly filters desktop nav for guests (lines 68-70) - only Home, Courses, Chat visible
Layout.jsx mobile dropdown correctly hides Progress and Messages for guests (lines 216-229)
Settings.jsx correctly shows only ThemeToggle for guests (lines 177-186)
Chat.jsx correctly shows read-only CTA for guests (lines 339-344) and hides input
Messages.jsx correctly shows blocked state for guests (lines 112-125)
Backend auth.py require_non_guest dependency correctly blocks guests (lines 73-76)
Backend social.py uses require_non_guest for POST /api/chat and POST /api/messages
Demo chat messages correctly seeded with 'Teacher' and 'Sarah M.' participants
No bottom navigation bar code in Layout.jsx - completely removed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest mode fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Guest created via POST /api/auth/guest or 'Try Demo' button, 2) Guest sees only Home/Courses/Chat in nav, 3) Guest Chat shows 5 demo messages (Teacher + Sarah M.) with read-only CTA, 4) Guest Settings shows only ThemeToggle, 5) Guest Messages shows blocked state, 6) Backend blocks guest POST to /api/chat and /api/messages with 403, 7) WebSocket rejects guests, 8) No bottom nav bar on any page, 9) Teacher renamed from 'Shakira' to 'Teacher' in all places.
